title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 15 December 2023
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 15 December 2023
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 15 December 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 16/12/2023
The United Arab Emirates (UAE) has recently introduced a comprehensive set of regulations about ship recycling. These regulations explicitly prohibit the use of "beaching" and "landing" methods
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2023-12-16_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-09-December-15-December-2023_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2023-12-16_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-09-December-15-December-2023_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
09 December 2023 - 15 December 2023
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
The United Arab Emirates (UAE) has recently introduced a comprehensive set of regulations about ship recycling. These regulations explicitly prohibit the use
of "beaching" and "landing" methods, which are commonly employed by ship recyclers in the Indian subcontinent and Turkey.
